document.source_title: Teacher from Pune leaked NEET question papers for ‘substantial monetary gains’: CBI

claims.claim_text: Manisha Gurunath Mandhare leaked final question papers to selected candidates in exchange for monetary gains.
claims.evidence_text: The Central Bureau of Investigation (CBI) has alleged before a Delhi court that an expert on the National Testing Agency’s (NTA) question-setting panel for NEET-UG 2026 leaked final question papers to selected candidates in exchange for 'substantial monetary gains'.

entities.name: Manisha Gurunath Mandhare
entities.description: Accused of leaking NEET question papers.
entities.evidence_text: The accused, Manisha Gurunath Mandhare, was arrested on Saturday from a reputed college in Pune.

entities.name: Central Bureau of Investigation (CBI)
entities.description: Investigating agency alleging the paper leak.
entities.evidence_text: The CBI further alleged that Mandhare conspired with other co-accused.

entities.name: National Testing Agency (NTA)
entities.description: Agency responsible for setting NEET question papers.
entities.evidence_text: She is one of the experts on the panel of NTA and involved in the process of setting the question papers.

events.evidence_text: The accused, Manisha Gurunath Mandhare, was arrested on Saturday from a reputed college in Pune.
The NEET-UG 2026 exam was cancelled following an alleged paper leak, with a retest now scheduled for June 21.

relationships.subject: Manisha Gurunath Mandhare
relationships.object: Manisha Waghmare and Prahlad Vittal Rao Kulkarni
relationships.evidence_text: The CBI further alleged that Mandhare conspired with other co-accused, including Manisha Waghmare and Prahlad Vittal Rao Kulkarni.

citations.title: Teacher from Pune leaked NEET question papers for ‘substantial monetary gains’: CBI

source_credibility.reason: The information is reported by a reputable news source.

geolocation.name: Pune
geolocation.evidence_text: The accused, Manisha Gurunath Mandhare, was arrested on Saturday from a reputed college in Pune.
